speaker: Argo
text: Professor Derich...? Maybe he’ll come… *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I never would've thought you’d actually come with me.

speaker: Diederich
text: Oh? I’m always up for it.

speaker: Diederich
text: Didn’t I tell you? Mental care is part of a professor’s job.

speaker: Diederich
text: When you wanna hear about what’s troublin' the students, gettin’ naked together is the best way! *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I... see. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: So? You got somethin' on your mind?

speaker: Argo
text: Oh, uh, no. Not really.

speaker: Diederich
text: Oh? You just wanted to invite me to the bath?

speaker: Argo
text: Yeah.

speaker: Diedereich
text: *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: ...Well, I guess that’s just how men o’ the sea are.

speaker: Diederich
text: When you’re a professor here, you don’t get hung up on the small things.

speaker: Argo
text: Being a knights college professor sounds tough. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: I can’t stand it sometimes! So much paperwork, the tight schedules, the pressure of bein' a good role model for the students…

speaker: Diederich
text: It’s not for me! Up until now I had a free and easy life! *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Then why did you become a professor? *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: Us adults have our reasons.

speaker: Argo
text: Adults...? *sigh*

speaker: Diedereich
text: “You’ll understand once you’re old enough to drink.” *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: “I’ve been able to do that for years!” *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Wahahaha!
